query:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', watched_at) AS "month!",
                          AVG(CAST(rating AS REAL)) AS "avg_rating!: f64",
                          COUNT(*) AS "count!: i64"
                   FROM reviews
                   WHERE user_id = ? AND watched_at >= datetime('now', '-12 months')
                   GROUP BY "month!"
                   ORDER BY "month!" ASC
